summary: Phase 1 feature testing complete. All 10 features verified working correctly. Backend API tests (14/14 passed) and UI tests (all passed) confirm implementation is correct.

minor.issue: hero_image field not returned when not set in DB (frontend has fallback DEFAULT_NOSOTROS_HERO)

passed_tests: Hero section height is 50vh (h-[50vh] class) - NOT h-screen
Section title is 'Empresas más consultadas' - NOT 'Empresas Destacadas'
/api/empresas-destacadas returns max 6 empresas with highlighted first, then by views
CTA section text: '¿Eres una empresa de turismo de naturaleza en Jalisco?'
Footer contains 'Sitio desarrollado por Aventúrate Por Jalisco'
Activity names resolve correctly in /empresas/ecomuk-aventura-natural detail page
Prensa page cards do NOT show dates (Calendar icon and date removed)
Nosotros page hero shows background image (not just solid green)
Categories section shows 5 categories (max 8) centered in grid
Categories display in 2-column grid on mobile with reduced size
No console errors on any page tested
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx: Hero section correctly uses h-[50vh] class
Home.jsx: Featured section title correctly says 'Empresas más consultadas'
Home.jsx: CTA text correctly says '¿Eres una empresa de turismo de naturaleza en Jalisco?'
Home.jsx: Footer correctly includes 'Sitio desarrollado por Aventúrate Por Jalisco' and dynamic year
Home.jsx: Categories limited to 8 with slice(0, 8)
empresas.py: empresas-destacadas endpoint correctly prioritizes destacada=true, then sorts by views, limits to 6
empresas.py: Activity ID to name resolution implemented in all empresa endpoints
Prensa.jsx: Date display removed from article cards (no Calendar icon, no fecha_publicacion)
Nosotros.jsx: Hero uses DEFAULT_NOSOTROS_HERO fallback when settings.hero_image not set
EmpresaDetalle.jsx: Activity names resolved via actividadesMap lookup
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data (3 empresas, 3 articulos, 5 categorias, 10 actividades)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features verified complete. All 10 requirements from the problem statement are implemented and working. Key endpoints: /api/empresas-destacadas (top 6 with activity name resolution), /api/empresas/:slug (activity name resolution), /api/nosotros-settings (hero_image default). Frontend pages tested: Home (hero 50vh, categories max 8, featured section title, CTA text, footer), Prensa (no dates), Nosotros (hero image), EmpresaDetalle (activity names). SMTP email is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.SMTP_email: Configured but not functional - silently skips due to missing SMTP credentials in .env
